headline: Lead Engineer
summary: Lead software engineering professional with 12+ years of experience architecting and delivering cloud-native, full-stack enterprise platforms across insurance, finance, healthcare, and e-commerce. Proven expertise in .NET, C#, React, and Angular, with strong depth in AWS, Azure DevOps, Docker, Service Bus, SQL Server, and PostgreSQL. Experienced in AI-enabled engineering, including designing MCP-based integrations and building agent-driven workflows and tools that expose enterprise capabilities for intelligent automation. Strong track record of leading cross-functional teams, driving CI/CD excellence, and delivering secure, scalable, high-performance solutions.
